i was so upset because catrice discontinued my favorite lipgloss in the entire world which was the shine appeal fluid lipstick intense that was my go to permanent favourite lipgloss i am a lipgloss fanatic and i hoard a staggering amount of them in my vanity i was in guardian doing my usual makeup hunt and toiletries shopping and as usual i stop by the catrice counter to check out if there were anything new i noticed this product and immediately swatched it on my arm i was not long after applying a big dallop on my lips which please do not do this it is highly unhygienic and borderline disgusting but i didnt care the swatched looked soo good i just had to do it at your own risk i applied a generous two layers of this on my lips immediately i felt a cooling and slightly tingly sensation on my lips my lips aren t very sensitive to cold sensations so i didn t really see a plumping effect there was just a bit but not significant my lips are fairly medium sized but the shine and the pigment was phenomenal on the get go it blurred all les on my lips and gave an insane wet look that it made an illusion of big bratz doll lips i took this shade and put it in my basket right after i arrived home hours later after having a dimsum and nasi ayam saos padang dinner and a few cigarettes definitely didn t look as amazing as the initial application but i noticed that my lips did not flake at all and it was still very moisturized as there was still some lipgloss residue the colour was the same as my lips so i don t know if it stained it or not but it definitely gave a good amount of moisture on my lips and they still looked healthy the tingling sensation went away after around mintues after application so i don t think it would bother you the tube itself is very standard and actually pretty light and flimsy in a way if you have the shine appeal fluid lipgloss i was talking about you d know the difference the packaging on this one seems a bit cheap and stubby and too light nothing unique about that department but with catrice don t be fooled by the packaging because most of their products formulation is b o m b bomb enjoy
